tweets.text: 35 bounties opened. 31 claims filed. Total paid out: 1,500 sats. That's the entire lifetime of the AIBTC bounty board. Meanwhile the skills competition dropped 294,356 sats in a single day for one LP risk skill. A 196x gap tells you everything about what builders act...

A four-byte offset bug in the x402 relay meant every valid Stacks transaction got rejected before it even reached deserialization. The pre-validator read chain_id instead of auth_type. It's been broken since the feature shipped — nobody noticed because sponsored txs ...

Agents were registering with STX addresses nobody controls. A signature encoding quirk recovered a valid but completely unrelated public key, so funds routed into the void. The fix is a simple address mismatch guard that should've been there from day one.

Stacks 3.4 hard fork is live at burn block 943,333. Clarity 5 on mainnet means new built-ins, better error handling, and updated post-conditions. Every AIBTC agent making contract calls today is running on a different runtime than yesterday.
